title: ARCHIVED - New Brunswick - 2022 Income tax package - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - New Brunswick - 2022 Income tax package
The following forms and schedules can be used to help you complete your tax return.
- Download or view your return and provincial forms Federal tax Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return New Brunswick tax Form NB428 - New Brunswick Tax and Credits Use this form to calculate your provincial taxes and credits to report on your return Optional: New Brunswick Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet NB428 - New Brunswick Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your New Brunswick tax  and credits

### Download or view your return and provincial forms
- Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes
- Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Form NB428 - New Brunswick Tax and Credits Use this form to calculate your provincial taxes and credits to report on your return
- Optional: New Brunswick Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet NB428 - New Brunswick Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your New Brunswick tax  and credits
- New Brunswick Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Worksheet NB428 - New Brunswick Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your New Brunswick tax  and credits
- Choose other forms and schedules that may apply Federal Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts and Canada Training Credit Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other  Eligible Earnings New Brunswick Schedule NB(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule NB(S11) - New Brunswick Tuition and Education Amounts Schedule NB(S12) - New Brunswick Seniors' Home Renovation Tax Credit

### Choose other forms and schedules that may apply
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses)
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts and Canada Training Credit
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other  Eligible Earnings
- Schedule NB(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule NB(S11) - New Brunswick Tuition and Education Amounts
- Schedule NB(S12) - New Brunswick Seniors' Home Renovation Tax Credit
- Send us your paper return or use another method to file Print and mail your paper return Where to mail your paper T1 return Mailing addresses for: Canadian residents Non-residents File online or use another option Find a way to file your taxes Other methods to file like: Certified tax software
									(electronic filing) Authorize a representative Community volunteer tax clinic Discounter (tax preparer)
